it:80.3: "Tayome, bhikkhave, akusalavitakkā. Katame tayo? Anavaññattipaṭisaṁyutto vitakko, lābhasakkārasilokapaṭisaṁyutto vitakko, parānuddayatāpaṭisaṁyutto vitakko. Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo akusalavitakkā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:80.5:
Yo ca puttapasuṁ hitvā,
Vivāhe saṁharāni ca;
Bhabbo so tādiso bhikkhu,
Phuṭṭhuṁ sambodhimuttaman"ti.
it:80.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Paṭhamaṁ.
